case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. PITOITUA LOTO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED OCT-16-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LOTO, PITOITUA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-28-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100, INCL.
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LOTO, PITOITUA
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2009, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SNYDER, DAVID B. SUBSTITUTED FOR BRACHFELD, ERICA L AS ATTORNEY FOR MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LOTO, PITOITUA DOES 1 TO 100, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-02-2009
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LOTO, PITOITUA
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LOTO, PITOITUA
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LOTO, PITOITUA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $2,691.28 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 63384040) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION OF ERICA L. BRACHFELD PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 B 1 & 2 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOTO, PITOITUA $4,350.00 PRINCIPAL, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,586.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
